hadith_entries.text:
578. Narrated A'isha: 'The Prophet
never missed
four raka'as before zohr Prayer and two raka'as before
fajr Prayer.' (Bukhari)

579. Narrated A'isha: 'The Prophet was never
more regular and punctual in offering any voluntary
prayer than the two raka'as before fajr prayer.' (Bukhari)

580. Narrated A'isha 'The Prophet used to perform
the two (optional) raka'as before fajr Prayer more
punctually than any other voluntary prayer.' (Agreed upon)
581. In the version compiled by Imam Muslim, it is
mentioned: "The two raka'as before fajr Prayer are better
than life and what it contains."
